# Murim Chronicles - Comprehensive Missing Modifiers Patch
# Auto-generated definitions for all character modifiers referenced in events
# These ensure add_character_modifier calls succeed silently
# CK3 logs errors for undefined modifiers - this file eliminates all of them

	general_opinion = -10
	stress_gain_mult = 0.1
}
